features: Deodorant - Right Guard Total Defence 5 combines the five essential benefits of an anti-perspirant into one
Benefits - It fights perspiration, prevents odour, long-lasting freshness, adapts to your level of activity and leaves low residue
Total defence 5 – Fights the 5 signs of perspiration: odour, wetness, stickiness, bacteria and stains (protection against yellow stains)
Powerful - Delivers 30% more protection power and 30% more active ingredients delivered per second compared to Right Guard 3D
Info – Works for up to 48 hours for maximum confidence, dermatologically tested, alcohol-free with a fresh, aquatic and floral fragrance
description: Product Description Right Guard Total Defence 5 combines the five essential benefits of an anti-perspirant into one. It fights perspiration, prevents odour, long-lasting freshness, adapts to your level of activity and leaves low residue. Delivers 30% more protection power and 30% more active ingredients delivered per second compared to Right Guard 3D. Shake well before use. Use in short bursts. Hold upright 15 cm from underarm and spray. If unit fails to operate rinse nozzle in warm water, make sure it is dry, then use as normal. Do not apply to irritated skin. Ingredients Butane, Propane, Cyclomethicone, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Isobutane, Isopropyl Myristate, Parfum, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Talc, Potassium Alum, Propylene Carbonate, Sodium Starch Octenylsuccinate, 2-Benzylheptanol, Benzyl Alcohol, Citronellol, Linalool, Phenoxyethanol Directions Shake well before use. Use in short bursts. Hold upright 15 cm from underarm and spray. If unit fails to operate, rinse nozzle in warm water, make sure it is dry, then use as normal. Safety Warning Danger: Pressurised container: May bursts if heated. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C. Keep out of reach of children. Read label before use. Use in well ventilated places. Do not spray into eyes. Solvent Abuse Can Kill Instantly. Extremely flammable aerosol. Box Contains 1 x Right Guard Women Total Defence 5 Sport Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Aerosol 250, ml (Pack of 6) See more
